calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: GAP-3 sleep-aggregation cluster: unified master flag end-to-end + equivalence validation
items.note: sleep_substrate GAP-3 owner-EXQ. Diagnostic/substrate-readiness (claim_ids=[]). ARM_CLUSTER (use_sleep_aggregation_cluster=True) vs ARM_EXPLICIT (8 sub-flags by hand). C1-C5: all Phase A-E components fire end-to-end under the single flag; C6: cluster == explicit (master flag is pure ergonomics, zero behavioural divergence). Dry-run 6/6 PASS 2026-05-16. Unblocks MECH-285/272/275/273 empirical promotion.
